message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'idr_init_base' sets signal field 'idr.idr_next', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=idr;field=idr_next;offset=20] [oracle:assert=idr.idr_next stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets idr_next without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
